title: Robot Puppy
summary: Premium-toy style matte-white robot puppy with animated heart-eyes, clean studio shot.
prompt: A tiny adorable robot puppy designed in the style of a high-end Japanese toy: rounded matte-white plastic body, large oval black-screen "eyes" showing animated blue hearts, articulated joints with brushed-metal accents, a little antenna with a green LED, sitting upright with one paw raised. Clean white studio backdrop with soft top lighting, gentle product photography drop-shadow. Square composition.
